hunter_likelihood_reason: MHLW paid placement license exists but official site shows general construction contractor; no headhunting/recruiting agency positioning
notes: Email info@sankokensetsu.co.jp confirmed on official recruitment page (line 84). MHLW page linked company site park5.wakwak.com/~sanko_kensetsu/. Company is pure construction contractor (土木工事/建築工事), not a headhunter.
